content_gaps: Most top results are product pages (Etsy, individual stores) not editorial gift guides. There's a lack of curated storytelling.
The symbolic connection between the moon (phases, cycles, light in darkness) and the sisterly bond is rarely explained in depth.
There is very little content discussing different styles of moon jewelry (e.g., crescent vs. full moon, minimalist vs. ornate) and matching them to a sister's personal style.
Material quality and craftsmanship are not a focus. Most SERPs are dominated by lower-priced, mass-market-feeling items rather than handcrafted, artisan pieces.
Pairing suggestions (e.g., 'if she loves her moon necklace, consider these matching earrings for her birthday') are completely absent.
